name: BIOMERICA INC
sic_description: In Vitro & In Vivo Diagnostic Substances
summary: Biomerica is a global biomedical technology company that develops, manufactures, and markets diagnostic test kits and therapeutic products. Its products analyze blood, urine, nasal, or fecal samples to diagnose diseases, food intolerances, and other conditions. Key products include inFoods IBS, a diagnostic-guided therapy using a blood test to identify IBS-triggering foods, and hp+detect, an FDA-cleared test for detecting Helicobacter pylori. Products are sold worldwide to clinical laboratories and point-of-care settings.
